From: Head of Operations, Brightcart (B2B subscriptions for independent grocers)
To: BI

We just got budget for "doing something with our data" and honestly we don't know
what we need yet. What can our data tell us? Where should we even start? Leadership
mostly talks about keeping the grocers we have and running leaner. The COO keeps
saying the support team is overstaffed for what they do.

What we have (from our systems person, plain English):

--- data landscape (as described, 2026-06-09) ---
- Billing system: subscriptions per store (plan, start/end dates, MRR), invoices
  back to 2024-01. Reliable, finance reconciles it monthly.
- Order platform: every wholesale order a grocer places through us (store, supplier,
  order value, line items), back to 2024-06.
- Support desk: tickets with store, category, open/close timestamps, agent. Export
  works, used daily.
- Old CRM: pre-2024 customer history and original sales notes. We think the export
  still works but nobody has opened it since the migration.
- Marketing: a spreadsheet of campaign spend by month, kept by the agency.
--- end ---

We can pull any of these as files for you. There's no dashboard, no metrics defined,
nobody has analyzed anything yet. What's worth knowing here?
